data.p1_kw_year_eur: Potﾃｨncia: Preu kW franja Punta - P1 (竄ｬ)

formulas.title: Fﾃｳrmules de facturaciﾃｳ
formulas.description:
Expressions jinja2 avaluades per hora.

**Variables horﾃries**: `kwh` (consum), `surplus_kwh` (excedent), `kwh_eur` (竄ｬ/kWh del perﾃｭode o PVPC), `surplus_kwh_eur` (compensaciﾃｳ 竄ｬ/kWh del perﾃｭode), `p1_kw`, `p2_kw`.

**Preus configurats**: `p1_kwh_eur`, `p2_kwh_eur`, `p3_kwh_eur`, `surplus_p1_kwh_eur`, `p1_kw_year_eur`, `p2_kw_year_eur`, `meter_month_eur`, `market_kw_year_eur`, `electricity_tax`, `iva_tax`.

**Suggerides (tarifa plana / no PVPC)**:
- Energia: `electricity_tax * iva_tax * kwh_eur * kwh`
- Potﾃｨncia: `electricity_tax * iva_tax * (p1_kw * p1_kw_year_eur + p2_kw * p2_kw_year_eur) / 365 / 24`
- Altres: `iva_tax * meter_month_eur / 30 / 24`
- Compensaciﾃｳ: `surplus_kwh * surplus_kwh_eur`

**Suggerides (PVPC)**:
- Energia: `electricity_tax * iva_tax * kwh_eur * kwh`
- Potﾃｨncia: `electricity_tax * iva_tax * (p1_kw * (p1_kw_year_eur + market_kw_year_eur) + p2_kw * p2_kw_year_eur) / 365 / 24`
- Altres: `iva_tax * meter_month_eur / 30 / 24`
- Compensaciﾃｳ: `surplus_kwh * kwh_eur`

data_description.power_formula: Suggerida: electricity_tax * iva_tax * (p1_kw * p1_kw_year_eur + p2_kw * p2_kw_year_eur) / 365 / 24
data_description.surplus_formula: Suggerida: surplus_kwh * surplus_kwh_eur  (sense IVA en compensaciﾃｳ simplificada)

confirm.title: Simulaciﾃｳ (amb impostos)
confirm.description: Revisa a baix el desglossament estimat del mes seleccionat. Canvia el mes al desplegable per simular-ne un altre. Marca ﾂｫConfirmar canvisﾂｻ nomﾃｩs quan el resultat sigui correcte.
